message:
feat(core,server): composite tmux pane IDs and ATC e-value overflow guard

core/pane_identity:
- Switch from bare pane IDs (%3) to composite session:window:pane keys
  (e.g., main:0:2) for uniqueness across tmux sessions
- Add get_composite_tmux_pane_id() using tmux display-message with
  fallback to $TMUX_PANE environment variable
- Update sanitize_pane_id to map ':' to '-' for filesystem safety
- Update list_live_tmux_panes to emit both composite and bare IDs
  for backwards-compatible cleanup of old identity files

server/atc:
- Cap ONS e-value at 1e100 to prevent f64 overflow during sustained
  miscalibration — the e-value is evidence not probability, so any
  value above threshold is equally actionable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
